Collocation: use your imagination;imagine that;hard to imagine
Example_EN: I cannot imagine life without music now.
Example_CN: 我现在无法想象没有音乐的生活。

Example_EN: It is important to drink enough water every day.
Example_CN: 每天喝足够的水很重要。

Example_EN: Her English has improved a lot this term.
Example_CN: 她这学期英语进步了很多。
MemoryTip: im + prove：证明自己变得更好。

Example_EN: Please put your bag in the corner by the door.
Example_CN: 请把包放在门边的角落里。

Example_EN: The price includes breakfast and free wifi.
Example_CN: 价格包括早餐和免费无线网。

Example_EN: Everyone is coming, including my little brother.
Example_CN: 每个人都会来，包括我弟弟。
MemoryTip: including = include 的 -ing 形式，表“包括”。

Example_EN: House prices increased a lot last year.
Example_CN: 去年房价上涨了很多。

Example_EN: The film was very good indeed, I watched twice.
Example_CN: 这部电影确实很好，我看了两遍。

Example_EN: Please give me more information about the course.
Example_CN: 请给我更多关于这门课的信息。
MemoryTip: in + form + ation：把事实组织成信息。

Collocation: inside the box;go inside;on the inside
Example_EN: It is warm inside the house this evening.
Example_CN: 今晚屋子里面很暖和。

Example_EN: I drank tea instead of coffee this morning.
Example_CN: 我今早喝茶代替了咖啡。

Example_EN: She takes a strong interest in local history.
Example_CN: 她对当地历史很感兴趣。

Example_EN: I am interested in learning Japanese next year.
Example_CN: 我对明年学日语感兴趣。
MemoryTip: interested：人对事物感兴趣；interesting 是事物本身有趣。

Example_EN: That documentary looks interesting for our class.
Example_CN: 那部纪录片对我们班来说看起来很有趣。

Example_EN: I found the answer on the internet yesterday.
Example_CN: 我昨天在互联网上找到了答案。

Example_EN: She walked into the library with a big smile.
Example_CN: 她面带微笑走进了图书馆。

Example_EN: Let me introduce my friend to you now.
Example_CN: 让我现在把朋友介绍给你。

Collocation: invent a machine;invent a story;newly invented
Example_EN: Who invented the telephone many years ago?
Example_CN: 多年前是谁发明了电话？

Example_EN: Did you invite her to your birthday party?
Example_CN: 你邀请她参加你的生日派对了吗？

Example_EN: We spent a week on a quiet island last summer.
Example_CN: 去年夏天我们在安静的岛上待了一周。
MemoryTip: is + land：水中间的陆地；i 不发音。

Example_EN: It is raining hard outside this afternoon.
Example_CN: 今天下午外面雨下得很大。
MemoryTip: it：指物、天气、时间等中性代词。

Example_EN: The dog wagged its tail when I arrived.
Example_CN: 我到时那只狗摇着它的尾巴。

Example_EN: The door closed by itself during the night.
Example_CN: 夜里门自己关上了。

Collocation: leather jacket;put on a jacket;winter jacket
Example_EN: He put on a warm jacket before going out.
Example_CN: 他出门前穿上了暖和的夹克。

Example_EN: We were stuck in a traffic jam for one hour.
Example_CN: 我们堵在交通堵塞里一个小时。

Example_EN: School starts again in early January here.
Example_CN: 这里学校在一月初重新开学。
MemoryTip: January：一年的第一个月，来自 Janus。

Collocation: blue jeans;a pair of jeans;wear jeans
Example_EN: She usually wears blue jeans at the weekend.
Example_CN: 她周末通常穿蓝色牛仔裤。

Collocation: find a job;part-time job;do a job
Example_EN: He found a part-time job near the university.
Example_CN: 他在大学附近找到一份兼职工作。

Collocation: join a club;join in;join the team
Example_EN: Would you like to join our football team?
Example_CN: 你想加入我们的足球队吗？
MemoryTip: join：接到一起 / 加入组织。

Collocation: tell a joke;make a joke;practical joke
Example_EN: He told a funny joke and everyone laughed.
Example_CN: 他讲了个好笑的笑话，大家都笑了。

Example_EN: The train journey to Edinburgh took four hours.
Example_CN: 去爱丁堡的火车旅程花了四小时。

Example_EN: I drink a glass of orange juice every morning.
Example_CN: 我每天早上喝一杯橙汁。

Example_EN: Our summer holiday usually begins in July.
Example_CN: 我们暑假通常从七月开始。

Example_EN: The children love to jump into the swimming pool.
Example_CN: 孩子们喜欢跳进游泳池。

Example_EN: The wedding will take place in mid-June.
Example_CN: 婚礼将在六月中举行。

Example_EN: I have just finished my homework this minute.
Example_CN: 我刚刚这一分钟才做完作业。
MemoryTip: just：刚刚 / 仅仅 / 公正。

Example_EN: Please keep the window closed at night.
Example_CN: 请晚上把窗户关着。
MemoryTip: keep：继续持有或使保持某状态。

Example_EN: Have you seen the key to the front door?
Example_CN: 你看见前门的钥匙了吗？

Example_EN: I need a new keyboard for my laptop.
Example_CN: 我的笔记本电脑需要一个新键盘。

Example_EN: Please do not kick the ball in the classroom.
Example_CN: 请不要在教室里踢球。

Example_EN: The little kids are playing in the garden.
Example_CN: 小孩子们在花园里玩。
MemoryTip: kid：小孩；口语 just kidding = 开玩笑。

Example_EN: Mosquitoes can kill animals in some hot places.
Example_CN: 在某些炎热地区，蚊子能杀死动物。

Example_EN: The school is three kilometres from my house.
Example_CN: 学校离我家三公里。

Example_EN: She is always kind to new students at school.
Example_CN: 她在学校对新生总是很友善。

Example_EN: The old story is about a kind young king.
Example_CN: 这个老故事讲的是一位善良的年轻国王。
MemoryTip: king 与 queen 成对记。

Example_EN: She gave her mother a kiss before school.
Example_CN: 上学前她亲了妈妈一下。

Example_EN: Mum is cooking dinner in the kitchen now.
Example_CN: 妈妈现在在厨房做晚饭。

Collocation: on your knees;hurt your knee;knee pain
Example_EN: He fell and hurt his left knee badly.
Example_CN: 他摔倒了，左膝盖伤得很重。
MemoryTip: knee：腿中间弯折处；k 不发音。

Example_EN: Please be careful with that sharp kitchen knife.
Example_CN: 请小心那把锋利的厨房刀。
MemoryTip: knife：切东西的刀具；k 不发音。

Example_EN: Do you know how to open this computer file?
Example_CN: 你知道怎么打开这个电脑文件吗？

Collocation: by the lake;lake view;across the lake
Example_EN: We walked around the lake after Sunday lunch.
Example_CN: 周日午饭后我们绕着湖散步。
MemoryTip: lake：比 pond 更大的淡水湖。

Collocation: desk lamp;turn on the lamp;bedside lamp
Example_EN: Please turn on the desk lamp for reading.
Example_CN: 请打开台灯来阅读。

Example_EN: English is a useful language for travel abroad.
Example_CN: 英语是出国旅行的有用语言。

Example_EN: They live in a large flat near the park.
Example_CN: 他们住在公园附近一套大公寓里。

Example_EN: I saw her at the cinema last Saturday night.
Example_CN: 上周六晚上我在电影院看见她。

Example_EN: Sorry I am late for the meeting today.
Example_CN: 抱歉我今天开会迟到了。

Collocation: see you later;later that day;much later
Example_EN: I will call you later this evening, OK?
Example_CN: 我今晚晚些时候给你打电话，好吗？
MemoryTip: later = late 的比较级，表“之后”。

Example_EN: The joke made the whole class laugh loudly.
Example_CN: 这个笑话让全班大声笑了起来。

Example_EN: You must not break the law in any country.
Example_CN: 在任何国家你都不能违法。

Collocation: become a lawyer;family lawyer;see a lawyer
Example_EN: She hopes to become a lawyer after university.
Example_CN: 她希望大学毕业后成为律师。

Example_EN: Do not be lazy about cleaning your room.
Example_CN: 打扫房间别偷懒。

Example_EN: Children learn new words very quickly at school.
Example_CN: 孩子们在学校学新词很快。

Example_EN: You should sleep at least eight hours tonight.
Example_CN: 你今晚至少应该睡八个小时。

Example_EN: We will leave for the airport at six.
Example_CN: 我们六点出发去机场。

Example_EN: Turn left at the next traffic lights, please.
Example_CN: 请在下一个红绿灯左转。
MemoryTip: left：左边，也是 leave 的过去式。

Example_EN: He hurt his leg while playing football yesterday.
Example_CN: 他昨天踢足球时伤到了腿。

Example_EN: I like a slice of lemon in my tea.
Example_CN: 我喜欢在茶里放一片柠檬。

Example_EN: Can you lend me your pen for a minute?
Example_CN: 能把笔借我用一分钟吗？

Example_EN: I spent less money this month than last month.
Example_CN: 我这个月花钱比上个月少。

Example_EN: Our next English lesson starts at ten.
Example_CN: 我们下一节英语课十点开始。

Example_EN: Please let me help you with those bags.
Example_CN: 请让我帮你拿那些包。

Example_EN: I wrote a letter to my grandma yesterday.
Example_CN: 我昨天给奶奶写了一封信。

Example_EN: His English is at a high level now.
Example_CN: 他的英语现在已达到很高水平。

Example_EN: I borrowed three books from the public library.
Example_CN: 我从公共图书馆借了三本书。
MemoryTip: libr- 与书有关：藏书之地。

Example_EN: Please lie down and rest for a few minutes.
Example_CN: 请躺下休息几分钟。
MemoryTip: lie：躺下，或说谎（词形相同意不同）。

Example_EN: Exercise is an important part of daily life.
Example_CN: 锻炼是日常生活的重要部分。

Collocation: lift up;give a lift;take the lift
Example_EN: Can you help me lift this heavy box?
Example_CN: 你能帮我抬起这个重箱子吗？

Collocation: turn on the light;traffic light;light blue
Example_EN: Please turn on the light; it is too dark.
Example_CN: 请开灯，太暗了。

Example_EN: I like to read before I go to bed.
Example_CN: 我喜欢在睡觉前阅读。

Example_EN: Please wait in line for the bus tickets.
Example_CN: 请排队买公交车票。

Example_EN: The children watched a lion at the zoo.
Example_CN: 孩子们在动物园看了一头狮子。
MemoryTip: lion：草原上的大型猫科动物。

Example_EN: I wrote a shopping list before I left home.
Example_CN: 出门前我写了一份购物清单。

Example_EN: Please listen carefully to the teacher's question.
Example_CN: 请仔细听老师的问题。

Example_EN: There is a little milk left in the fridge.
Example_CN: 冰箱里还剩一点牛奶。

Example_EN: They live in a small town near the sea.
Example_CN: 他们住在海边一座小镇。
MemoryTip: live /lɪv/ 居住；/laɪv/ 现场直播。

Example_EN: We buy bread from the local shop each day.
Example_CN: 我们每天在当地小店买面包。

Example_EN: It has been a long time since we met.
Example_CN: 我们很久没见面了。

Example_EN: Please look at the board and copy the words.
Example_CN: 请看黑板并抄下单词。

Collocation: lose weight;lose a game;lose your way
Example_EN: Do not lose your ticket on the way home.
Example_CN: 回家路上别把票弄丢了。

Collocation: a lot of;lots of;thanks a lot
Example_EN: There are a lot of books on that shelf.
Example_CN: 那个架子上有许多书。

Example_EN: Please do not play loud music after ten.
Example_CN: 十点后请不要大声放音乐。

Example_EN: I love to walk by the river after dinner.
Example_CN: 我喜欢晚饭后沿河散步。

Example_EN: We had a lovely day at the beach yesterday.
Example_CN: 昨天我们在海滩度过了美好的一天。

Example_EN: They bought the table at a very low price.
Example_CN: 他们以很低的价格买下了那张桌子。

Example_EN: Good luck with your English test tomorrow!
Example_CN: 祝你明天英语考试好运！

Example_EN: She felt lucky to find an empty seat.
Example_CN: 她庆幸找到了一个空座位。

Example_EN: Shall we have lunch together at twelve?
Example_CN: 我们十二点一起吃午饭好吗？

Example_EN: The washing machine stopped working this morning.
Example_CN: 洗衣机今天早上停止运转了。

Example_EN: She was mad at me for forgetting her birthday.
Example_CN: 我忘了她生日，她很生气。
MemoryTip: mad：生气或发疯（英式口语常指生气）。

Example_EN: I bought a fashion magazine at the station.
Example_CN: 我在车站买了一本时尚杂志。
